lorehq

─[3]-Guides──
CommandsCustomizationGuidesPlatform SupportWorking Across Repos
─[4]-Workflow──
Active Work Architecture
─[ Ansible Docker Host Role ]─ ┐

Ansible Docker Host Role

Purpose

Manage Docker-based infrastructure VMs via Ansible, including stack deployment, NFS mounts, and service configuration.

When to Use

  • Deploying or updating Docker stacks on infra-docker VM.
  • Configuring NFS mounts for Docker app data.
  • Adding new Docker services to the infra stack.

Role Structure

iac/ansible/roles/infra-docker/
├── defaults/main.yml     # Default variables (images, ports, paths)
├── handlers/main.yml     # Service restart handlers
├── tasks/main.yml        # Main task list
└── templates/
    ├── docker-compose.yml.j2        # Main stack (NPM + Portainer)
    └── vaultwarden-compose.yml.j2   # Vaultwarden stack

Key Variables

VariableDefaultPurpose
nfs_server[nfs-vip]NFS VIP (see environment docs)
nfs_export/infraNFS export path
nfs_mount_point/srv/infra-dataLocal mount point
docker_infra_dir/opt/infraDocker compose/data directory

Processes

Initial Deployment

cd iac/ansible
ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/infra-docker.yml

Update Stack Images

  1. Edit roles/infra-docker/defaults/main.yml to update image tags.
  2. Run the playbook:
ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/infra-docker.yml

Adding a New Service

  1. Add variables to defaults/main.yml.
  2. Create template in templates/.
  3. Add deployment tasks to tasks/main.yml.

Secrets Management

The vaultwarden.env file contains secrets and is NOT managed by Ansible:

  • Location: /opt/infra/vaultwarden.env
  • Storage: Vaultwarden (HSD-INC.NET / Shared-Infra / Vaultwarden Admin Token) If it doesn’t exist, the role creates a placeholder that must be manually populated.

Dependencies

  • Terraform: VM must be provisioned first.
  • NFS Ganesha: HA cluster (CT 101 + CT 102) must be running.

Safety Rules

  • Never store secrets in compose templates or defaults.
  • Always run playbook with --check first for production changes.
  • Verify NFS mount is working before stack deployment.
PgUp/PgDn: scroll b: bulk commands q: quit x: menu ← → ↑ ↓: navigate
Donate 0.24.4
